author: heymoosh
description: Instantly creates a TickTick task from the current block of text using a keyboard shortcut.

manifest.author: Muxin Li
manifest.description: Create TickTick tasks from text at your cursor with automatic deep links back to your notes. Requires the Advanced URI plugin.
manifest.name: TickTick Quick Add Task

name: TickTick Quick Add Task

releases.author: heymoosh
releases.description: Fixes OAuth "invalid_grant" / "Invalid redirect" errors caused by trailing-slash mismatches between the URI registered in TickTick and the one sent by the plugin (reported in #2). The plugin now strips trailing slashes from the redirect URI on save and on use.
releases.name: 1.2.3 — OAuth redirect URI fix

releases.author: heymoosh
releases.description: Task titles are now stripped of Markdown formatting (checkboxes, bold/italic, links, headings) and sent to TickTick as plain text. Task descriptions are unchanged.
releases.name: 1.2.2 — Plain-text task titles

releases.author: heymoosh
releases.description:
Cleanup release to clear warnings from the Obsidian community directory review. No user-facing changes.

## Changes
- Plugin description no longer mentions Obsidian (directory naming rule)
- Removed unknown `main` field from manifest.json
- README title now matches the plugin name (`TickTick Quick Add Task`)
- Removed unused `base64UrlEncode` helper from `main.ts`
- Removed dead `express` dependency and `server.js` (clears transitive vulnerability warnings)
- `package.json` metadata updated from sample-plugin template to real values
releases.name: 1.2.1 — Directory review fixes

releases.author: heymoosh
releases.description:
First mobile-compatible release. Adds iOS and Android support and reworks the OAuth flow to deep-link back into Obsidian.

## What's new
- **Mobile support** — `isDesktopOnly` is now false; runs on iOS and Android.
- **Seamless OAuth** — the Vercel callback page deep-links back into Obsidian via `obsidian://ticktick-callback`, so the access token populates automatically. Manual paste fallback remains for cases where the redirect doesn't fire.
- **Tappable auth link** — the Connect button now shows a popup with a tappable login link, working around iOS WebKit's user-gesture restrictions on `window.open`.
- **Three-dot menu integration** — "Create TickTick task" now appears in the file's ⋯ menu on both mobile and desktop, alongside items like Advanced URI's.
- **Redesigned settings** — two distinct views: a guided two-step "Set up TickTick" view before connecting, and a clean "Connected" view afterwards with day-to-day options (Selection mode, Tag position) up front and connection details collapsed behind an Advanced section. New Disconnect button.
- **Proper command icon** — `lucide-circle-check-big`, replacing the question-mark fallback.
- **Rewritten README** with mobile install paths (BRAT + manual), accurate setup steps, all invocation methods, and current troubleshooting.

## Installing via BRAT
1. Settings → Community plugins → install **Obsidian42 - BRAT**.
2. Settings → BRAT → Add beta plugin → `heymoosh/ticktick-quick-add-obsidian`.
3. Enable **TickTick Quick Add Task** in Community plugins.
releases.name: 1.2.0 — Mobile compatibility

releases.author: heymoosh
releases.description:
## What's new
- **Selection mode setting**: Choose between capturing the current line or the entire paragraph
- **Tag position setting**: Choose whether #ticktick is appended or prepended
- Defaults to single-line + append, fixing list formatting issues

releases.author: heymoosh
releases.description: Forcing update to main.js, updated manifest.json to require Obsidian version 1.4 or greater
releases.name: Big Fixes

releases.author: heymoosh
releases.description:
v1.0.0 – Initial Release
	•	Added support for creating TickTick tasks directly from Obsidian notes.
	•	Secure OAuth integration with token persistence and automatic refresh.
	•	Advanced linking using the Advanced URI plugin for direct navigation back to your notes.
	•	Improved settings UI with secure input for API credentials.
	•	Bug fixes and performance improvements.
releases.name: TickTick Quick Add Task Plugin for Obsidian - Release
